## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] Scoring constants in `constants/scoring.ts` and `lib/scoring.ts` are unchanged
      (or: change is intentional and explicitly approved)
- [ ] Design system tokens used — no hard-coded color, spacing, or typography values
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with an entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] PR scope is focused on one concern
- [ ] No hard-coded secrets, credentials, or absolute local paths introduced
- [ ] If performance-sensitive files changed, perf notes were added to `PERFORMANCE_PLAN.md`
